narrative:
Precinct Oak Hill I (precinct in Jackson County) has 366 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points.
